'''shapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaagmar|vaagmar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaagmar|vaagmar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shapaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæpækæth|shæpækæth]] || [[word:shæpækæj|shæpækæj]] || [[word:shæpækæsh|shæpækæsh]] || [[word:shæpækæ|shæpækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapapakath|shapapakath]] || [[word:shapapakaj|shapapakaj]] || [[word:shapapakash|shapapakash]] || [[word:shapapaka|shapapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapakath|shapakath]] || [[word:shapakaj|shapakaj]] || [[word:shapakash|shapakash]] || [[word:shapaka|shapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapafkath|shapafkath]] || [[word:shapafkaj|shapafkaj]] || [[word:shapafkash|shapafkash]] || [[word:shapafkaf|shapafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shapakatha|shapakatha]] || [[word:shapakaja|shapakaja]] || [[word:shapakasha|shapakasha]] || [[word:shapakaka|shapakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shapakath|shapakath]] || [[word:shapakaj|shapakaj]] || [[word:shapakash|shapakash]] || [[word:shapaka|shapaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shapakathal|shapakathal]] || [[word:shapakajal|shapakajal]] || [[word:shapakashal|shapakashal]] || [[word:shapakakal|shapakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shapakathatha|shapakathatha]] || [[word:shapakajaja|shapakajaja]] || [[word:shapakashasha|shapakashasha]] || [[word:shapakaka|shapakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shapakathan|shapakathan]] || [[word:shapakajan|shapakajan]] || [[word:shapakashan|shapakashan]] || [[word:shapakakan|shapakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shapakathaoro|shapakathaoro]] || [[word:shapakajaoro|shapakajaoro]] || [[word:shapakashaoro|shapakashaoro]] || [[word:shapakakaoro|shapakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
